mapper.insert: insert into T_BASE_TABLEINFO (TABLE_CODE, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_CODE, COLUMN_NAME, PRIMARY_KEYFIELD, DEFAULT_VALUE, VC_COMMENT, DATA_TYPE, L_LENGTH, L_PRECISION, PRIMARYKEY_FLAG) values (#{tableCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{columnCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{columnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{primaryKeyfield,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{defaultValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{length,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{precision,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{primarykeyFlag,jdbcType=CHAR})

insert into T_BASE_TABLEINFO (TABLE_CODE, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_CODE, COLUMN_NAME, PRIMARY_KEYFIELD, DEFAULT_VALUE, VC_COMMENT, DATA_TYPE, L_LENGTH, L_PRECISION, PRIMARYKEY_FLAG)
(select #{item.tableCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.columnCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.columnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.primaryKeyfield,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.defaultValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.length,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.precision,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.primarykeyFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} from dual)

MERGE INTO T_BASE_TABLEINFO C USING (
(SELECT null TABLE_CODE, #{item.tableCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} TABLE_CODE,
null TABLE_NAME, #{item.tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} TABLE_NAME,
null COLUMN_NAME, #{item.columnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} COLUMN_NAME,
null COLUMN_CODE, #{item.columnCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} COLUMN_CODE,
null PRIMARY_KEYFIELD, #{item.primaryKeyfield,jdbcType=VARCHAR} PRIMARY_KEYFIELD,
null DEFAULT_VALUE, #{item.defaultValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR} DEFAULT_VALUE,
null VC_COMMENT, #{item.comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR} VC_COMMENT,
null DATA_TYPE, #{item.dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} DATA_TYPE,
null L_LENGTH, #{item.length,jdbcType=VARCHAR} L_LENGTH,
null L_PRECISION, #{item.precision,jdbcType=DECIMAL} L_PRECISION,
null PRIMARYKEY_FLAG #{item.primarykeyFlag,jdbcType=DECIMAL} PRIMARYKEY_FLAG
FROM DUAL)
) B ON(C.COLUMN_CODE = B.COLUMN_CODE and C.TABLE_CODE = B.TABLE_CODE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET C.TABLE_NAME = B.TABLE_NAME, C.COLUMN_NAME = B.COLUMN_NAME, C.PRIMARY_KEYFIELD = B.PRIMARY_KEYFIELD, C.DEFAULT_VALUE = B.DEFAULT_VALUE, C.VC_COMMENT = B.VC_COMMENT, C.DATA_TYPE = B.DATA_TYPE, C.L_LENGTH = B.L_LENGTH, C.L_PRECISION = B.L_PRECISION, C.PRIMARYKEY_FLAG = B.PRIMARYKEY_FLAG WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN insert (TABLE_CODE, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_CODE, COLUMN_NAME, PRIMARY_KEYFIELD, DEFAULT_VALUE, VC_COMMENT, DATA_TYPE, L_LENGTH, L_PRECISION, PRIMARYKEY_FLAG) VALUES ( B.TABLE_CODE, B.TABLE_NAME, B.COLUMN_CODE, B.COLUMN_NAME, B.PRIMARY_KEYFIELD, B.DEFAULT_VALUE, B.VC_COMMENT, B.DATA_TYPE, B.L_LENGTH, B.L_PRECISION, B.PRIMARYKEY_FLAG )
mapper.select: select TABLE_CODE, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_CODE, COLUMN_NAME, PRIMARY_KEYFIELD, DEFAULT_VALUE, VC_COMMENT, DATA_TYPE, L_LENGTH, L_PRECISION, PRIMARYKEY_FLAG from T_BASE_TABLEINFO
